sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from "react"; import "./Auth.css"; import axios from "axios"; const NewPrediction = () => { const [form, setForm] = useState({ Gender: "", Education_Level: "", Qualification: "", Experience: "", JobRole: "", PrimarySkill: "", Location: "" }); const [salary, setSalary] = useState(""); const handleNewPrediction = () => { setForm({ Gender: "", Education_Level: "", Qualification: "", Experience: "", JobRole: "", PrimarySkill: "", Location: "" }); setSalary(""); }; const handleChange = (e) => { setForm({ ...form, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }); }; // 🔥 PREDICT API const handlePredict = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); try { const user = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("user")); if (!user) { alert("User not logged in"); return; } const response = await axios.post( "http://localhost:5000/predict", { ...form, userEmail: user.email } ); const predictedSalary = response.data.salary; setSalary(predictedSalary); let count = localStorage.getItem("predictionCount") || 0; count = parseInt(count) + 1; localStorage.setItem("predictionCount", count); localStorage.setItem("lastSalary", predictedSalary); let history = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("history")) || []; history.push({ ...form, salary: predictedSalary }); localStorage.setItem("history", JSON.stringify(history)); } catch (error) { console.error("Prediction error:", error); alert("Prediction failed. Check backend."); } }; const qualificationOptions = { Diploma: ["Diploma in Computer Engineering", "Diploma in IT"], Bachelor: ["BCA", "B.Tech / B.E", "B.Sc", "BBA", "B.Com"], Master: ["MCA", "MSc CS", "MBA", "M.E/M.Tech"], PhD: ["PhD CS", "PhD AI"] }; const jobSkillMap = { IT: { roles: [ "Software Engineer", "Frontend Developer", "Backend Developer", "Full Stack Developer", "Data Scientist", "Machine Learning Engineer", "DevOps Engineer", "Cloud Engineer", "Cybersecurity Analyst", "Mobile App Developer", "Data Engineer" ], skills: [ "Java", "Python", "JavaScript", "React", "Node.js", "SQL", "MongoDB", "AWS", "Docker", "Kubernetes", "TensorFlow", "PyTorch" ] }, NON_IT: { roles: [ "HR Executive", "Finance Analyst", "Marketing Executive", "Sales Manager", "Business Analyst", "Operations Manager", "Customer Support Executive" ], skills: [ "Communication", "Excel", "Financial Analysis", "Digital Marketing", "CRM", "Leadership", "Sales Strategy" ] } }; return (

💼 Salary Prediction

{salary && (

Predicted Salary

₹ {salary}

)}
); }; export default NewPrediction;
